title: Sign Plates: Letters & Symbols
description: This is your sign to sign bigger!
body:
![Sign Plates - Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3249414b2eeee096ce5650d46288ce0cb4a4429e_0.webp) ![Sign Plates - Mod Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07bed6939351a3f07ed8b06bb38dd6f14c9a8449_0.webp) ![Sign Plates - Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3249414b2eeee096ce5650d46288ce0cb4a4429e_0.webp)

Check out the gallery for more use case examples

This mod adds a ton of new decorative sign plates that can be placed in any orientation, on any side of a block. They are perfect for labeling things and for writing text that can actually be read from afar. No more spending hours trying to spell things out with custom banners.
![Sign Plates - Stonecutter](https://i.imgur.com/dY7FpPY.gif) The mod is also very lightweight. Its textures stay within Minecraft’s normal 16×16 format, the block models use shared base model logic, and hidden faces are culled when placed against walls. ![Sign Plates - Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3249414b2eeee096ce5650d46288ce0cb4a4429e_0.webp) ## Update v1.1.0 - Tint & Glow You can now dye Sign Plates and make them glow using Glow Ink Sacs. Colored variants use Minecraft’s tinting system to stay lightweight. Per-part coloring was considered, but would likely require block entities and hurt performance/long-distance rendering. ![Sign Plates - Glow & Tint](https://i.imgur.com/vlpb94i.gif) Colored lighting note: The mod itself does not add true colored lighting to vanilla Minecraft. Colored light emission depends on your shaderpack. Known shader setups that can display colored lighting with glowing tinted Sign Plates: - [Complementary Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) + [Euphoria Patches](https://modrinth.com/mod/euphoria-patches), with Euphoria Patches' ACT + SSBL + Dynamic Lighting Support option enabled - [Rethinking Voxels](https://modrinth.com/shader/rethinking-voxels) - Possibly other shaderpacks with colored lighting support ![Sign Plates - Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3249414b2eeee096ce5650d46288ce0cb4a4429e_0.webp)
🛠️ Crafting

Craft sign plates easily using iron ingots and deepslate,
then convert them into any variant with a stonecutter

![Empty Sign Plate - Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94e72935be6cb61a256ed0218158a277ce804fb5.png) ![Sign Plates - All Plates](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12e80f24d14a74bc3e80718a153c55a4dcbf12a3_0.webp) ![Sign Plates - Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3249414b2eeee096ce5650d46288ce0cb4a4429e_0.webp)
💡 Ideas that may be implemented in the future:

  • Glow ink makes signs glow
  • Right-clicking any sign plate opens a selection screen for easier switching
  • Swappable frame materials
  • Dyeable signs
  • More sign plate designs
